news.headline: Self-driving tech supplier Mobileye targets U.S. robotaxi launch in 2027
news.summary: Self-driving technology supplier Mobileye Global announced it would launch its own robotaxi service Tuesday.

news.headline: Carvana is expanding into new vehicles. The implications could reshape the U.S. automotive retail market
news.summary: Carvana has bought seven new vehicle franchises since last year that primarily sell Stellantis' Chrysler, Dodge, Jeep and Ram brands.

keyLevels.note: Leading the tape at $738.86 — key for risk appetite
Pivot $753.55 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into the open: Bearish — favor defined-risk spreads.
Use QQQ $738.86 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: NVDA PUT — enter $9.07–$10.03, target $14.33+, stop $5.73.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Futures point to a softer open with QQQ -0.69% and SPY -0.17%. Composite sentiment -22 (Bearish). The tape is being driven mainly by qqq / mega-cap tech, sector rotation, market breadth (a/d). VIX at 15.14 (+0.28%). Environment read: favor defined-risk spreads. Financials (+1.42%) is leading while Technology (-1.97%) lags. Premarket strength in JPM, GOOGL; weakness in NFLX, AMD. The desk's highest-conviction setup is NVDA (6.5/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
